title: Faster Hoppers
description: A plugin that introduces TurboHoppers, allowing specific hoppers to transfer items at a faster rate.
body:
# **Faster Hoppers**

**This plugin introduces TurboHoppers which are upgraded hoppers that transfer items at a much a faster rate, with speeds and recipes all customized and managed through an in-game GUI.**

---

## **⭐ Core Features**

*   **Craftable, Tiered Hoppers:** Create multiple levels of hoppers, each with its own unique recipe and transfer speed.
*   **Advanced Item Filtering:** Set a whitelist or blacklist for each individual hopper to control exactly which items passes through. (Accessed by sneak-right-clicking a TurboHopper with an empty hand).
*   **Full In-Game GUI Control:** Use the **/fh settings** command to access a menu where you can:
    *   Visually edit the crafting recipe for each hopper tier.
    *   Enable or disable the crafting recipe for each tier.

---

## **📺 See It In Action**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/2JDtDvLJI1Y" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b29375623444f16b19a6beddebb68e4fe437701_0.webp)

---

## **⌨️ Commands & Permissions**

The main command is **/fasterhopper** (alias: **/fh**).

*   **/fh settings**
    *   Opens the main settings and editing menu.
    *   **Permission:** `fasterhoppers.command.gui`


*   **/fh give <target> <type> [amount]**
    *   Gives a player a specific type of TurboHopper.
    *   **Permission:** `fasterhoppers.command.give`


*   **/fh reload**
    *   Reloads the plugin's configuration files.
    *   **Permission:** `fasterhoppers.command.reload`


*   **/fh recipes**
    *   Opens a read-only GUI for players to view TurboHopper recipes.
    *   **Permission:** `fasterhoppers.command.recipes`

*   **/sethopperseed**
    *   Advanced hopper configuration and debugging.
    *   **Permission:** `fasterhoppers.command.sethopperseed`


*   **Filter Permission:**
    *   `fasterhoppers.filter` - Allows opening the item filter GUI on a TurboHopper. (Defaults to everyone).


*   **Admin Permission:**
    *   `fasterhoppers.*` - Grants access to all plugin commands. (Defaults to OP)

---

## **📖 More Information**

For detailed instructions, guides, and extra info, check out my wiki page:

🔗 https://xsueddoom.gitbook.io/fasterhoppers-wiki
